entry.title: Bir Zamanlar Çukurova Tierra Amarga Capitulo 135 Español

link.title: Bir Zamanlar Çukurova Tierra Amarga Capitulo 135 Español

entry.content:
✔️LUNES 27 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 125 ESPAÑOL Aceptas ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️MARTES 28 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 126 ESPAÑOL ¡Perdóname ¡ ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️MIERCOLES 29 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 127 ESPAÑOL Algo pasa ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️JUEVES 30 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 128 ESPAÑOL la verdad ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️VIERNES 31 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 129 ESPAÑOL Todos es tu culpa ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️LUNES 3 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 130 ESPAÑOL Ojala pudieras ver cuánto te amo ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️MARTES 4 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 131 ESPAÑOL Tras las rejas ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️MIERCOLES 5 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 132 ESPAÑOL No estoy bien ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️JUEVES 6 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 133 ESPAÑOL Ahora vas a conocerme ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️JUEVES 6 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 133 ESPAÑOL Ahora vas a conocerme ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
✔️VIERNES 7 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 134 ESPAÑOL La fuga ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .
entry.summary: ✔️LUNES 27 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 125 ESPAÑOL Aceptas ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️MARTES 28 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 126 ESPAÑOL ¡Perdóname ¡ ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️MIERCOLES 29 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 127 ESPAÑOL Algo pasa ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️JUEVES 30 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 128 ESPAÑOL la verdad ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️VIERNES 31 DE JULIO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 129 ESPAÑOL Todos es tu culpa ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️LUNES 3 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 130 ESPAÑOL Ojala pudieras ver cuánto te amo ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️MARTES 4 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 131 ESPAÑOL Tras las rejas ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️MIERCOLES 5 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 132 ESPAÑOL No estoy bien ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️JUEVES 6 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 133 ESPAÑOL Ahora vas a conocerme ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️JUEVES 6 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 133 ESPAÑOL Ahora vas a conocerme ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS . ✔️VIERNES 7 DE AGOSTO DE 2020, TIERRA AMARGA / BIR ZAMANLAR CUKUROVA CAPITULO 134 ESPAÑOL La fuga ESTRENO COMPARTAN EN SUS REDES SOCIALES FAVORITAS .

entry.title: S. Korea reports 279 new cases; social distancing raised to Level 2

link.title: S. Korea reports 279 new cases; social distancing raised to Level 2

entry.content:
오늘부터 서울•경기지역에 ‘사회적 거리두기’ 2단계 격상… 50명 이상 모임 금지, 스포츠 경기는 무관중으로
South Korea reported 2-hundred-79 new cases of the coronavirus on Sunday.
Of those, 2-hundred-67 are local transmissions, with a surge of cases in the greater Seoul area.
Effective Sunday, the government has raised the the level of social distancing from level 1 to 2.
That means a ban on gatherings of more than fifty people indoors and more than a hundred people outdoors,… and there’ll be no spectators at professional sporting events.
Stricter quarantine measures will be enforced at facilities regarded as high-risk, which include clubs, singing rooms, buffets and computer cafes.
Masks will also be required at wedding venues, theaters and religious facilities,… while daycare centers are advised to close.
entry.summary: 오늘부터 서울•경기지역에 ‘사회적 거리두기’ 2단계 격상… 50명 이상 모임 금지, 스포츠 경기는 무관중으로 South Korea reported 2-hundred-79 new cases of the coronavirus on Sunday. Of those, 2-hundred-67 are local transmissions, with a surge of cases in the greater Seoul area. Effective Sunday, the government has raised the the level of social distancing from level 1 to 2. That means a ban on gatherings of more than fifty people indoors and more than a hundred people outdoors,… and there’ll be no spectators at professional sporting events. Stricter quarantine measures will be enforced at facilities regarded as high-risk, which include clubs, singing rooms, buffets and computer cafes. Masks will also be required at wedding venues, theaters and religious facilities,… while daycare centers are advised to close.

entry.title: Did Subhash Ghai Destroy Mahima Chaudhry’s Bollywood Career?

link.title: Did Subhash Ghai Destroy Mahima Chaudhry’s Bollywood Career?

entry.content: The unfortunate death of actor Sushant Singh Rajput has initiated a debate on nepotism and Camps in the Bollywood industry. Several actors from the industry are slowly coming out to share their encounters with the camps and lobby of Bollywood that destroyed their career. Recently, actor Mahima Chaudhry spoke about how she lost several films due to ace filmmaker Subhash Ghai. For those who are unaware, Mahima made her Bollywood debut with Subhash Ghai’s film Pardes. In a recent interview, Mahima accused Subhash and said, “I was bullied by Mr. Subhash Ghai. He even took me to the court and wanted me to cancel my first show. It was quite stressful. He sent a message to all the producers that nobody should work with me! If you pick up one of the issues of Trade Guide magazine in 1998 or 1999, there was an ad that he had given which stated that if anybody wanted to work with me, that person would have to contact him. Otherwise, it would be a breach of contract. However, there was no such contract which said that I had to seek his permission.” However, Subhash Ghai has refuted her claims. Though he admitted that there was a small confict between both, he said that Mahima had later apologized to him and they are good friends now. Subhash said in a statement, “I am amused reading this news. . Mahima and I are very good friends till date and are still in touch through messages. She is a very nice and mature woman of today. She recently shared on how she gets welcomed at every event with a song from Pardes ‘I love my India’ even after 23 years.” Talking about their conflict, he said, “Yes , there was a small conflict in 1997 post the release of Pardes, which became a big blockbuster and for which she even got the filmfare award for best actor. My company did send her a show cause notice for flouting a clause in our agreement. Media n industry reacted in a big way and so I withdrew n canceled her contract with Mukta . After 3 years she came to me with her family and apologised for her impulsive reaction. I forgave her n thereafter we became friends again.” Subhash also mentioned that Mahima did a guest appearance in a song in his last film Kanchi in 2015. Well, we wonder what is wrong with this industry now. Whom to believe and whom to ignore, who says the truth and who exaggerates, it is becoming too hard to tell.
entry.summary: The unfortunate death of actor Sushant Singh Rajput has initiated a debate on nepotism and Camps in the Bollywood industry. Several actors from the industry are slowly coming out to share their encounters with the camps and lobby of Bollywood that destroyed their career. Recently, actor Mahima Chaudhry spoke about how she lost several films due to ace filmmaker Subhash Ghai. For those who are unaware, Mahima made her Bollywood debut with Subhash Ghai’s film Pardes. In a recent interview, Mahima accused Subhash and said, “I was bullied by Mr. Subhash Ghai. He even took me to the court and wanted me to cancel my first show. It was quite stressful. He sent a message to all the producers that nobody should work with me! If you pick up one of the issues of Trade Guide magazine in 1998 or 1999, there was an ad that he had given which stated that if anybody wanted to work with me, that person would have to contact him. Otherwise, it would be a breach of contract. However, there was no such contract which said that I had to seek his permission.” However, Subhash Ghai has refuted her claims. Though he admitted that there was a small confict between both, he said that Mahima had later apologized to him and they are good friends now. Subhash said in a statement, “I am amused reading this news. . Mahima and I are very good friends till date and are still in touch through messages. She is a very nice and mature woman of today. She recently shared on how she gets welcomed at every event with a song from Pardes ‘I love my India’ even after 23 years.” Talking about their conflict, he said, “Yes , there was a small conflict in 1997 post the release of Pardes, which became a big blockbuster and for which she even got the filmfare award for best actor. My company did send her a show cause notice for flouting a clause in our agreement. Media n industry reacted in a big way and so I withdrew n canceled her contract with Mukta . After 3 years she came to me with her family and apologised for her impulsive reaction. I forgave her n thereafter we became friends again.” Subhash also mentioned that Mahima did a guest appearance in a song in his last film Kanchi in 2015. Well, we wonder what is wrong with this industry now. Whom to believe and whom to ignore, who says the truth and who exaggerates, it is becoming too hard to tell.

entry.title: Chaos, punches as Bomet MCAs elect new speaker

link.title: Chaos, punches as Bomet MCAs elect new speaker

entry.content: Chaos rocked the Bomet county assembly on Friday morning during the election of a speaker after Embomos Mca Robert Serbai grabbed the mace and attempted to flee with it.
entry.summary: Chaos rocked the Bomet county assembly on Friday morning during the election of a speaker after Embomos Mca Robert Serbai grabbed the mace and attempted to flee with it.

entry.title: Tout savoir sur les reprises des concessions funéraires

link.title: Tout savoir sur les reprises des concessions funéraires

entry.content:
La concession funéraire désigne l’emplacement acheté dans un cimetière (caveau, tombe) ou au sein d’un columbarium pour les urnes funéraires.
Il peut s’agir d’une concession :
- individuelle, collective ou familiale
- temporaire (entre 5 et 15 ans), trentenaire (30 ans), cinquantenaire (50 ans), ou perpétuelle (durée illimitée).
Mais 2 ans après l’expiration du contrat de concession funéraire, la mairie peut la reprendre, sans en informer la famille.
Pour éviter cela, la demande de renouvellement doit être faite dans la marie du cimetière concerné dans les 2 ans suivant l’échéance de la concession.
L’entretien de la sépulture d’un proche peut être associé à une obligation civique, morale et traditionnelle.
Sachez donc que la mairie peut reprendre la concession funéraire si celle-ci est en état d’abandon (c’est-à-dire qu’elle représente un risque de salubrité ou d’hygiène nuisant à la décence du cimetière en raison de son délabrement).
Cette procédure pourra être enclenchée 3 ans après le constat d’abandon si la concession a plus de 30 ans, si le public et la famille en ont été informés et si aucune inhumation n’a eu lieu dans la concession durant les 10 années précédentes.
Mais il est parfois difficile de remplir ce devoir d’entretien des sépultures par manque de temps ou en raison de l’éloignement géographique.
Alors certaines sociétés (par exemple : L’entretien du souvenir) en prennent la charge.
entry.summary: La concession funéraire désigne l’emplacement acheté dans un cimetière (caveau, tombe) ou au sein d’un columbarium pour les urnes funéraires. Il peut s’agir d’une concession : - individuelle, collective ou familiale - temporaire (entre 5 et 15 ans), trentenaire (30 ans), cinquantenaire (50 ans), ou perpétuelle (durée illimitée). Mais 2 ans après l’expiration du contrat de concession funéraire, la mairie peut la reprendre, sans en informer la famille. Pour éviter cela, la demande de renouvellement doit être faite dans la marie du cimetière concerné dans les 2 ans suivant l’échéance de la concession. L’entretien de la sépulture d’un proche peut être associé à une obligation civique, morale et traditionnelle. Sachez donc que la mairie peut reprendre la concession funéraire si celle-ci est en état d’abandon (c’est-à-dire qu’elle représente un risque de salubrité ou d’hygiène nuisant à la décence du cimetière en raison de son délabrement). Cette procédure pourra être enclenchée 3 ans après le constat d’abandon si la concession a plus de 30 ans, si le public et la famille en ont été informés et si aucune inhumation n’a eu lieu dans la concession durant les 10 années précédentes. Mais il est parfois difficile de remplir ce devoir d’entretien des sépultures par manque de temps ou en raison de l’éloignement géographique. Alors certaines sociétés (par exemple : L’entretien du souvenir) en prennent la charge.

entry.title: Amit Shah दिल्ली के AIIMS में भर्ती,हल्के बुखार के बाद अस्पताल में कराया भर्ती वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Amit Shah दिल्ली के AIIMS में भर्ती,हल्के बुखार के बाद अस्पताल में कराया भर्ती वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Union Home Minister Amit Shah has been admitted to AIIMS, New Delhi. According to media reports, Shah has been admitted to the old private ward of AIIMS at two o’clock in the night … It is being told that he had mild fever … after which he was brought to AIIMS .. A team of doctors supervised him. She is Recently Amit Shah has won the battle against Corona. But now he has been admitted to AIIMS late night, where a team of doctors, led by doctor Randeep Guleria, is monitoring Amit Shah’s health.
केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री अमित शाह को नई दिल्ली स्थित एम्स में भर्ती कराया गया है. मीडिय रिपोर्ट्स के मुताबिक शाह को देर रात दो बजे एम्स के ओल्ड प्राइवेट वार्ड में भर्ती किया गया है…बताया जा रहा है कि उन्हें हल्का बुखार था…जिसके बाद उन्हें एम्स लाया गया..डॉक्टरों की एक टीम उनकी निगरानी कर रही है. हाल ही में अमित शाह ने कोरोना से जंग जीती है. लेकिन अब देर रात उन्हें एम्स में भर्ती कराया गया है, जहां डॉक्टर रणदीप गुलेरिया की अगुवाई में डॉक्टर्स की टीम अमित शाह के स्वास्थ्य पर नजर बनाए हुए हैं।
#AmitShah #AIIMS
entry.summary: Union Home Minister Amit Shah has been admitted to AIIMS, New Delhi. According to media reports, Shah has been admitted to the old private ward of AIIMS at two o’clock in the night … It is being told that he had mild fever … after which he was brought to AIIMS .. A team of doctors supervised him. She is Recently Amit Shah has won the battle against Corona. But now he has been admitted to AIIMS late night, where a team of doctors, led by doctor Randeep Guleria, is monitoring Amit Shah’s health. केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री अमित शाह को नई दिल्ली स्थित एम्स में भर्ती कराया गया है. मीडिय रिपोर्ट्स के मुताबिक शाह को देर रात दो बजे एम्स के ओल्ड प्राइवेट वार्ड में भर्ती किया गया है…बताया जा रहा है कि उन्हें हल्का बुखार था…जिसके बाद उन्हें एम्स लाया गया..डॉक्टरों की एक टीम उनकी निगरानी कर रही है. हाल ही में अमित शाह ने कोरोना से जंग जीती है. लेकिन अब देर रात उन्हें एम्स में भर्ती कराया गया है, जहां डॉक्टर रणदीप गुलेरिया की अगुवाई में डॉक्टर्स की टीम अमित शाह के स्वास्थ्य पर नजर बनाए हुए हैं। #AmitShah #AIIMS

entry.title: Manchester by the Sea (2016) - Bande annonce

link.title: Manchester by the Sea (2016) - Bande annonce

entry.content:
Film - Drame réalisé par Kenneth Lonergan.
Avec Casey Affleck (Lee Chandler), Michelle Williams (Randi), Gretchen Mol (Elise), Kyle Chandler (Joe Chandler), Kara Hayward (Silvie), Heather Burns (Jill), Erica McDermott (Sue), Lucas Hedges (Patrick), Susan Pourfar (Irene, l’infirmière), Missy Yager (madame Olsen).
Sortie en 2016
Synopsis :
Séparée de son épouse Randi, Lee travaille comme concierge dans une ville aussi éloignée que possible de l’endroit où il a grandi. Sa vie est bouleversée quand Joe, son frère aîné, décède brutalement d’un infarctus. Dans son testament, Joe désigne Lee, dévasté par le chagrin, comme le tuteur légal de son neveu, Patrick, un jeune homme de 16 ans. Père de trois enfants, Lee n’est pas du tout préparé à cette nouvelle responsabilité. D’autant qu’elle implique un déménagement et un retour dans une ville où il a des souvenirs douloureux. Patrick, qui se partage entre deux petites amies et son groupe de rock, a dû mal à accepter son nouveau tuteur…
En savoir plus :
L’actualité du cinéma :
Les films de la semaine :
Retrouvez Télérama sur :
Facebook :
Instagram :
Twitter :
Youtube :
entry.summary: Film - Drame réalisé par Kenneth Lonergan. Avec Casey Affleck (Lee Chandler), Michelle Williams (Randi), Gretchen Mol (Elise), Kyle Chandler (Joe Chandler), Kara Hayward (Silvie), Heather Burns (Jill), Erica McDermott (Sue), Lucas Hedges (Patrick), Susan Pourfar (Irene, l’infirmière), Missy Yager (madame Olsen). Sortie en 2016 Synopsis : Séparée de son épouse Randi, Lee travaille comme concierge dans une ville aussi éloignée que possible de l’endroit où il a grandi. Sa vie est bouleversée quand Joe, son frère aîné, décède brutalement d’un infarctus. Dans son testament, Joe désigne Lee, dévasté par le chagrin, comme le tuteur légal de son neveu, Patrick, un jeune homme de 16 ans. Père de trois enfants, Lee n’est pas du tout préparé à cette nouvelle responsabilité. D’autant qu’elle implique un déménagement et un retour dans une ville où il a des souvenirs douloureux. Patrick, qui se partage entre deux petites amies et son groupe de rock, a dû mal à accepter son nouveau tuteur… En savoir plus : L’actualité du cinéma : Les films de la semaine : Retrouvez Télérama sur : Facebook : Instagram : Twitter : Youtube :

entry.title: Nitin Gadkari का ऐलान, MSME सेक्टर के तहत 5 करोड़ नई नौकरियां पैदा होंगी वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Nitin Gadkari का ऐलान, MSME सेक्टर के तहत 5 करोड़ नई नौकरियां पैदा होंगी वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
While the agriculture sector is taking the lead in reviving the country’s economy derailed due to the Corona crisis, there are also high expectations from the most employable msme sector .. Union Minister Nitin Gadkari at Swavalamban e-Summit 2020 Said that MSME sector has a huge contribution in terms of development in our country. Currently 30% of GDP growth rate comes from MSME sector. MSME accounts for 48% of exports. Till now we have created 11 crore jobs in this sector. He further said that my belief and idea is that we should increase it to at least 30 percent growth rate to 50 percent, 48 percent to 60 percent of exports in the coming 5 years and Create 5 crore new jobs
कोरोना संकट के कारण पटरी से उतरी देश की अर्थव्यवस्था को फिर से रफ्तार देने के लिए जहां कृषि क्षेत्र लीड कर रहा है तो वहीं सबसे ज्यादा रोजगार देने वाले msme सेक्टर से भी बड़ी उम्मीदें हैं..स्वावलंबन ई-समिट 2020 में केंद्रीय मंत्री नितिन गडकरी ने कहा कि हमारे देश में विकास के मामले में MSME सेक्टर का बहुत बड़ा योगदान है। अभी GDP ग्रोथ रेट में से 30% इनकम MSME सेक्टर से होती है। एक्सपोर्ट के मामले में 48% योगदान MSME का रहता है। अब तक इस सेक्टर में हमने 11 करोड़ नौकरियां पैदा की हैं।उन्होंने आगे कहा कि मेरा विश्वास और विचार है कि हम आने वाले 5 साल में इसे बढ़ाकर कम से कम 30 प्रतिशत ग्रोथ रेट को 50 प्रतिशत, 48 प्रतिशत निर्यात को 60 प्रतिशत करें और 5 करोड़ नई नौकरियां पैदा करें
#MSMESector #NitinGadkari
entry.summary: While the agriculture sector is taking the lead in reviving the country’s economy derailed due to the Corona crisis, there are also high expectations from the most employable msme sector .. Union Minister Nitin Gadkari at Swavalamban e-Summit 2020 Said that MSME sector has a huge contribution in terms of development in our country. Currently 30% of GDP growth rate comes from MSME sector. MSME accounts for 48% of exports. Till now we have created 11 crore jobs in this sector. He further said that my belief and idea is that we should increase it to at least 30 percent growth rate to 50 percent, 48 percent to 60 percent of exports in the coming 5 years and Create 5 crore new jobs कोरोना संकट के कारण पटरी से उतरी देश की अर्थव्यवस्था को फिर से रफ्तार देने के लिए जहां कृषि क्षेत्र लीड कर रहा है तो वहीं सबसे ज्यादा रोजगार देने वाले msme सेक्टर से भी बड़ी उम्मीदें हैं..स्वावलंबन ई-समिट 2020 में केंद्रीय मंत्री नितिन गडकरी ने कहा कि हमारे देश में विकास के मामले में MSME सेक्टर का बहुत बड़ा योगदान है। अभी GDP ग्रोथ रेट में से 30% इनकम MSME सेक्टर से होती है। एक्सपोर्ट के मामले में 48% योगदान MSME का रहता है। अब तक इस सेक्टर में हमने 11 करोड़ नौकरियां पैदा की हैं।उन्होंने आगे कहा कि मेरा विश्वास और विचार है कि हम आने वाले 5 साल में इसे बढ़ाकर कम से कम 30 प्रतिशत ग्रोथ रेट को 50 प्रतिशत, 48 प्रतिशत निर्यात को 60 प्रतिशत करें और 5 करोड़ नई नौकरियां पैदा करें #MSMESector #NitinGadkari

entry.title: Atalanta Bergame - Paris Saint-Germain : notre simulation FIFA 20 (Ligue des Champions 1 4 de finale)

entry.content: C’est le match de l’année pour les supporters parisiens. Pour le plus grand bonheur des fans du PSG nous avons simulé le 1/4 de final de Champions League entre l’Atalanta Bergame et le Paris Saint-Germain sur FIFA 20.

entry.title: Ertughrul Ghazi ।।Season-02, Episode -02।। Urdu dubbed ।। ارطغرل غازی ।।اردو میں ।। HD+ Video quality ।। Dolby 5.1 Audio ।।

link.title: Ertughrul Ghazi ।।Season-02, Episode -02।। Urdu dubbed ।। ارطغرل غازی ।।اردو میں ।। HD+ Video quality ।। Dolby 5.1 Audio ।।

entry.content:
Diriliş: Ertuğrul (transl. "Resurrection: Ertuğrul") is a Turkish historical fiction[2] and adventure television series created by Mehmet Bozdağ, starring Engin Altan Düzyatan in the title role. It was filmed in Riva, a village in the Beykoz district of Istanbul, Turkey, and premiered on TRT 1 in Turkey on December 10, 2014. The show is set in 13th century and centers around the life of Ertuğrul, the father of Osman I, who was the founder of the Ottoman Empire.
Diriliş: Ertuğrul
Also known as:-
"Ertugrul Ghazi"
"Resurrection: Ertugrul"
Muslim Game of Thrones[1]
entry.summary: Diriliş: Ertuğrul (transl. "Resurrection: Ertuğrul") is a Turkish historical fiction[2] and adventure television series created by Mehmet Bozdağ, starring Engin Altan Düzyatan in the title role. It was filmed in Riva, a village in the Beykoz district of Istanbul, Turkey, and premiered on TRT 1 in Turkey on December 10, 2014. The show is set in 13th century and centers around the life of Ertuğrul, the father of Osman I, who was the founder of the Ottoman Empire. Diriliş: Ertuğrul Also known as:- "Ertugrul Ghazi" "Resurrection: Ertugrul" Muslim Game of Thrones[1]

entry.title: Artigas (Sedia): ‘La ‘app’ detecta en promedio 6,4 contactos por positivo’

entry.content: Carme Artigas, secretaria de Estado de Digitalización e Inteligencia Artificial, habla sobre el los resultados del proyecto piloto de La Gomera.
entry.summary: Carme Artigas, secretaria de Estado de Digitalización e Inteligencia Artificial, habla sobre el los resultados del proyecto piloto de La Gomera.

entry.title: Robin’s Wish Trailer #1 (2020) Susan Schneider Williams, Shawn Levy Documentary Movie HD

link.title: Robin’s Wish Trailer #1 (2020) Susan Schneider Williams, Shawn Levy Documentary Movie HD

entry.content: Robin’s Wish tells the powerful true story of actor/comedian Robin Williams’ final days. For the first time, Robin’s fight against a deadly neurodegenerative disorder, known as Lewy Body Dementia, is shown in stunning detail. Through a gripping journalistic lens, this incredible story sheds an entirely new light on the tragedy, beauty and power behind the mind of one of the greatest entertainers of all time.
entry.summary: Robin’s Wish tells the powerful true story of actor/comedian Robin Williams’ final days. For the first time, Robin’s fight against a deadly neurodegenerative disorder, known as Lewy Body Dementia, is shown in stunning detail. Through a gripping journalistic lens, this incredible story sheds an entirely new light on the tragedy, beauty and power behind the mind of one of the greatest entertainers of all time.

entry.content: L’entraîneur de l’Atlético de Madrid est remis en question, le nouveau coach de la Juventus cherche un nouveau buteur, et Cavani est toujours plus proche de Benfica, voici votre revue de presse du 14 août 2020.

entry.title: Omid Scobie talks about his new Harry and Meghan book

link.title: Omid Scobie talks about his new Harry and Meghan book

entry.content: Omid Scobie’s new book about the Duke and Duchess of Sussex, ‘Finding Freedom’ has finally been published. It reveals details of Harry and Meghan’s most personal moments, from when the Prince first said I love you, to details of the supposed rift between the royal brothers. Report by Blairm. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
entry.summary: Omid Scobie’s new book about the Duke and Duchess of Sussex, ‘Finding Freedom’ has finally been published. It reveals details of Harry and Meghan’s most personal moments, from when the Prince first said I love you, to details of the supposed rift between the royal brothers. Report by Blairm. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at

entry.summary: Solskjaer is delighted the midfielder is back in the fold and making up for lost time in a Red Devils shirt.

entry.title: Apple To Samsung: Smartphone Companies to invest big in India Oneindia Tamil

link.title: Apple To Samsung: Smartphone Companies to invest big in India Oneindia Tamil

entry.content:
#Samsung
#Apple
#China
உலகின் முன்னணி எலெக்ட்ரானிக்ஸ் கம்பெனியான சாம்சங் நிறுவனமும், தன்னுடைய உற்பத்தியை சில நாடுகளுக்கு மாற்றுவதாகச் செய்திகள் வெளியாகி இருக்கின்றன. குறிப்பாக, இந்தியாவில் ஸ்மார்ட்ஃபோன் உற்பத்தியைப் பெருக்க, திட்டம் தீட்டிக் கொண்டு இருப்பதாகச் செய்திகள் வெளியாகி இருக்கின்றன.
Samsung plans to make devices worth $40 billion in india Samsung may move a considerable part of its smartphone manufacturing process to india. Samsung plans to make devices worth $40 billion in india.
entry.summary: #Samsung #Apple #China உலகின் முன்னணி எலெக்ட்ரானிக்ஸ் கம்பெனியான சாம்சங் நிறுவனமும், தன்னுடைய உற்பத்தியை சில நாடுகளுக்கு மாற்றுவதாகச் செய்திகள் வெளியாகி இருக்கின்றன. குறிப்பாக, இந்தியாவில் ஸ்மார்ட்ஃபோன் உற்பத்தியைப் பெருக்க, திட்டம் தீட்டிக் கொண்டு இருப்பதாகச் செய்திகள் வெளியாகி இருக்கின்றன. Samsung plans to make devices worth $40 billion in india Samsung may move a considerable part of its smartphone manufacturing process to india. Samsung plans to make devices worth $40 billion in india.
